name: @wxyc/album-reviews-etl
description: WXYC nightly pull ETL (album-reviews-sheet-sync plan / ADR 0011): mirror the 'Album Review Responses' Google Form spreadsheet into the album_review_submissions archive table, keyed on source_key (form:<ISO UTC> of the form timestamp; collision-proofed nots: fallback). UPSERT-only — rows are never deleted; a pure-SQL+TS link pass FKs album_id on singleton library matches and never overwrites.
